title: Extracted competency source items
description: Faithful source statements and their locations before normalization.

source_version.description: The source version from which these items were extracted.

items.description: A non-empty collection of source-local statements.

nonEmptyString.description: A string containing at least one non-whitespace character.

sourceId.description: The stable identifier of the source being extracted.

itemId.description: A stable identifier unique within one source.

locator.description: A precise human-readable location within the represented source.

item.description: One faithful source statement before normalization or relationship design.

statement.description: The original requirement or a faithful transcription.

context.description: Unique hierarchy labels preserved from the source.

declared_level.description: A level label exactly as declared by the source.
